title: Reddy Account Recovery
content: 3. Steps to recover a Reddy account 3.1. Introduction The Reddy Program is the official communication channel between the agent and the account manager. It is used for work follow-up, support, handling requests, and performance updates. To ensure service quality, the program follows a policy related to activity and regular logins. 3.2. Reddy Program Closure Policy The Reddy Program is automatically closed if the agent does not use it or show any activity for a continuous period of 15 days. Inactivity includes: not opening the program, not sending messages, and not interacting with the account manager. 3.3. What Happens When the Program Is Closed? Communication via Reddy will be temporarily suspended. The agent will not be able to send or receive messages until reactivation. Reopening the program may require identity verification to ensure the account belongs to the agent. 3.4. How to Reopen the Reddy Program Contact the verification team directly via Telegram: t.me/r_verification Information that may be requested: username or agent ID, proof of ownership (screenshot or confirmation), any additional info. Once the required details are sent, the request will be reviewed and the program will be reopened as soon as possible. 3.5. Advice for the Agent We recommend opening the program and sending at least one message every 10-12 days to keep the program active and avoid automatic closure.

title: Working as an Agent
content: 1. General information on how to work as an agent As a master agent, your work primarily involves carrying out transactions with players that you need to find in your area. To perform these transactions, you will need to use the MobCash application, which I will send you to download. By working with players, you will earn profits. Your profit comes from making transactions with a X% commission on deposits and Y% on withdrawals made with players. You receive your profit on the third day of each month, and if this date falls on a weekend, you will receive the profit on the next business day. The profits will be automatically deposited into your MobCash account on the third day of each month for transactions completed in the previous month. The MobCash App The MobCash app is an application used to carry out deposit and withdrawal transactions in players' accounts. After downloading, you will be directed to the login page. Log in using your MobCash credentials provided in the first message of the chat. After logging in, the home page will appear, where you can deposit for players and withdraw money to their accounts. Device Activation Once you enter the login information correctly, a new window will appear. You must send us a screenshot of this window so that we can activate your account. Each time you use a new device, or whenever this screen appears, send a screenshot. For security purposes, please contact your account manager and provide the following activation code: ca49 Once your account is activated, a window with Deposit and Withdraw options appears. Limit and Balance The limit and balance are indicators that show the funds currently available in your account and the funds you have already deposited into players' accounts. Limit: the amount currently available in your account. Balance: the total amount that has already been spent on players' deposits. Example: When you start working after your first deposit, the limit will equal the amount you deposited. After making the first deposit into a player's account, the limit decreases by the same deposit amount, while the balance increases by the same amount. How to make a deposit Log in to your player account. Click the "Deposit" button and choose your preferred payment method. The deposit amount will be automatically transferred from the player's account to your account. The selected payment method will be saved for future deposits. To change it, contact your account manager. Minimum deposit amount is $15. How players make a withdrawal The player logs in to their account, selects Withdraw, then clicks Cash Agent. In the City field, they select the city of the withdrawal location; in the Street field, they select the specific site. They create a withdrawal request, and a Confirmation Code appears. They enter the confirmation code in the designated field. Agent steps: Select the Withdraw option in MobCash. Enter the Player ID and the confirmation code, then approve. Funds transfer to your MobCash account. Important Notes If you have another player account on 1xbet, do not perform any transactions using both your MobCash account and that other account – it may get blocked. You are required to find players yourself; we do not provide players for agents. Contact your account manager for more information on finding players.

title: Autoreserve Setup
content: 5. Instructions on how to set up an autoreserve Go to your main account on 1xBet. Take your user ID. Go to the payment section. Choose your preferred payment method. The funds will be transferred automatically to MobCash in the limit. As for the money transfer, it is an automatic process, and sometimes these transfers may take a little longer to appear. Once the transfer is completed, you will receive a message on your Reddy account similar to: DB Finance BotDebited from fingroup 13 015,59 DZDM (50,08 USD) transferred to the cashier 13 015,59 DZDM (50,08 USD) If you receive the message and notice that the money has not arrived yet, try logging out and logging back in again. If it still does not appear, contact your account manager.

title: Home
content: General Guide for 1xBet Agents Your complete resource for managing players, transactions, and growing your business. 💼 Working as an Agent MobCash app, deposits, withdrawals, profits, device activation, limits. 📱 Social Media Strategies Use Facebook, Instagram, Telegram to attract players and build trust. 🔐 Reddy Account Recovery Program closure policy (15 days), how to reopen, verification. 💸 Withdrawal Issues What if agent has insufficient EPOS balance? Two solutions. ⚙️ Autoreserve Setup Steps to set up automatic fund transfers, confirmation messages. 💳 Changing Payment Method Contact manager, commission averaging, confirmation. 👥 Adding a Subagent Find, pay $50, fill form, commissions, web management. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) How do I become a 1xBet agent? To become an agent, you need to contact a manager, provide the necessary documentation, and meet the initial requirements for player management. What is the minimum withdrawal amount? The minimum withdrawal amount depends on your specific payment method and region. Please check the "Withdrawals" section for more details. Glossary of Terms MobCash The official application used by 1xBet agents to manage player deposits and withdrawals. EPOS Balance The electronic balance held by an agent used to facilitate player transactions. Subagent An individual recruited by an agent to help manage players and expand the network.

title: Changing Payment Method
content: 6. The process for changing a payment method Contact Your Account Manager in Reddy You must first contact your account manager or support manager in Reddy. They will provide you with information about the available payment methods for your country and the fees or percentages associated with each method when depositing. Choosing Your Payment Method(s) You can select one or multiple payment methods. If you choose two or more methods, the commission applied will be calculated as the average of the fees for the selected methods: For two methods: Commission = (Fee1 + Fee2) / 2 For three methods: Commission = (Fee1 + Fee2 + Fee3) / 3 Confirming and Applying the Payment Method Once you have agreed, your account manager will submit a request to change or add the selected method to your account. You can check the status in your 1xBet account under "Deposit Methods". Important: Make sure to confirm the available payment methods before making any deposits. The selected method(s) will affect the commission applied to your transactions.

title: Social Media Strategies
content: 2. The importance of using social media to attract new players & grow the agent base Social media has become one of the strongest tools for 1xBet agents to expand their player network, increase deposits, and grow overall performance. Huge audience Platforms like Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and Telegram have millions of active users every day. This allows agents to reach more people, find potential players quickly, and spread promo codes faster. Easy Communication with Players Social media helps agents respond quickly to players, solve problems instantly, and build trust and long-term relationships. A player who trusts you is more likely to deposit again. Creating Professional Branding When you use social media the right way, you look like a professional agent. This increases confidence and encourages people to join through your channel. Examples: posting your results, sharing successful withdrawals, showing proofs of payments. Finding New Players More Effectively You can use social media to find new players through sports groups, betting communities, TikTok videos, Facebook pages, and Telegram channels. Posting regularly keeps your page active and visible. Why Using Social Media Improves Your Results Because you reach more people, people see your work, players trust you when they see real proofs, you become known in your region, and you get daily new leads automatically. This increases deposits, withdrawals, your profit, and your activity level as an agent. Important Notes Telegram groups are the strongest tool for agents. Stay active – reply quickly to your players. You can also use our posters that we send in the chat. If you want, you can have your own promo code. Write to manager@partners1xbet.com to request creation of your promo code.

title: Adding a Subagent
content: 7. How to add subagent Find Someone to Work With You: Have a person ready to work as your sub-agent before starting registration. Inform Your Account Manager: Notify your account manager about the new sub-agent. Be Ready to Pay $50: A $50 payment is required to create and activate the sub-agent's account. This amount will later appear in your Web Management account. No sub-agent account can be opened without this payment. Fill out the Subagent Form: Complete in English with: City, Region, Country Name of Cash Desk Geolocation (example: 32.533556342, 3.43567425268) Currency Full Name Contact Number Also submit the sub-agent's ID card and a selfie with the ID for verification. Sub-Agent MobCash Account: The sub-agent receives their own separate MobCash account. Account Manager Support All communication with subagents will be only through you, the master agent. The account manager will not communicate directly with the subagent. Commission Structure As a master agent, you can take a portion of the sub-agent's commissions. Agree on the split before recruitment. Transaction Type Total Commission Master Agent Share (Example) Sub-Agent Share (Example) Deposits X% 1/5 of X% 4/5 of X% Withdrawals Y% 1/2 of Y% 1/2 of Y% Example - Deposits Player deposits $100. Subagent earns X% → $X. You take $X/5, sub-agent keeps $4X/5. Example - Withdrawals Player withdraws $100. Subagent earns Y% → $Y. You take $Y/2, leave $Y/2 to subagent. Web Management Platform After the sub-agent is approved, your account manager will create a Web Management account for you. This system allows you to monitor sub-agent activities, track deposits/withdrawals, view total commissions, and manage transfers to MobCash. All your deposits and monthly commissions will be sent to your Web Management account (including subagents' commissions). You can then transfer any amount to your own MobCash or your subagent's MobCash. Transfer Steps Go to Eposes → Prepayment Structure Select Superagent Click on your name → Click Transfer Choose whether to transfer to yourself or your sub-agent Insert the amount

title: Withdrawal Issues
content: 4. How a player can make a withdrawal if the agent doesn't have enough epos balance Important Notes: If the agent doesn't have enough funds to pay the player, it is better not to process the withdrawal until the agent's balance is sufficient to avoid any complications. Option 1: Agent Deposits to Other Players The agent can deposit funds to other players' accounts to increase his balance, because after the deposit, the funds go from the limit to the agent's balance. By doing this, the agent may be able to process the player's withdrawal request for the required amount. Option 2: Contact Security Team for Alternative Withdrawal Method If the agent is unable to resolve the issue by depositing funds, the player can contact the Security team directly via email security@1xbet-team.com with: A full description of the situation, including any supporting documents. A request for approval to withdraw using an alternative method (e.g., cryptocurrency, bank transfer). Contact details (e.g., cryptocurrency wallet address). A clear passport photo and personal photos for verification. Once the Security team receives the request, they will review and approve the withdrawal via an alternative method, if applicable.

title: الصفحة الرئيسية
content: دليل عام للوكلاء موردك الكامل لإدارة اللاعبين والمعاملات وتنمية عملك. 💼 العمل كوكيل تطبيق MobCash، الإيداعات، السحوبات، الأرباح، تفعيل الجهاز، الحدود. 📱 استراتيجيات وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي استخدم فيسبوك، إنستغرام، وتيليجرام لجذب اللاعبين وبناء الثقة. 🔐 استعادة حساب ريدي سياسة إغلاق البرنامج (15 يومًا)، كيفية إعادة الفتح، التحقق. 💸 مشاكل السحب ماذا لو لم يكن لدى الوكيل رصيد كافٍ في الإيصالات؟ حلان. ⚙️ إعداد الاحتياطي التلقائي خطوات إعداد التحويلات التلقائية للأموال، رسائل التأكيد. 💳 تغيير طريقة الدفع اتصل بالمدير، متوسط العمولة، التأكيد. 👥 إضافة وكيل فرعي البحث، دفع 50 دولارًا، ملء النموذج، العمولات، الإدارة عبر الويب. الأسئلة الشائعة (FAQ) كيف أصبح وكيلاً لـ 1xBet؟ لتصبح وكيلاً، تحتاج إلى الاتصال بالمدير، وتقديم المستندات اللازمة، واستيفاء المتطلبات الأولية لإدارة اللاعبين. ما هو الحد الأدنى لمبلغ السحب؟ يعتمد الحد الأدنى لمبلغ السحب على طريقة الدفع المحددة ومنطقتك. يرجى مراجعة قسم "السحوبات" لمزيد من التفاصيل. قاموس المصطلحات MobCash التطبيق الرسمي الذي يستخدمه وكلاء 1xBet لإدارة إيداعات وسحوبات اللاعبين. رصيد EPOS الرصيد الإلكتروني الذي يحتفظ به الوكيل ويستخدم لتسهيل معاملات اللاعبين. وكيل فرعي فرد يتم تعيينه من قبل الوكيل للمساعدة في إدارة اللاعبين وتوسيع الشبكة.
